description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian depicted in a casual, modern outfit suitable for urban environments. He is wearing a long-sleeved top with contrasting panels on the sleeves and chest, paired with matching pants that feature a similar color-blocked design. The figure's posture suggests he is in mid-stride, with one leg forward and one arm slightly bent, conveying a natural walking motion. His shoes are simple and low-profile, complementing the overall casual appearance. The hairstyle is neatly groomed and short, with the hair combed back for a tidy look. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a streamlined silhouette.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian in a color-blocked long-sleeve top and matching pants, mid-stride with a neat short hairstyle and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the facial features, chest panel, and left arm in detail.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical design of the outfit and the forward stride.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back of the head, right arm, and the back panel of the clothing.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear of the outfit, both arms, and the back of the legs.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved casual top and matching pants with a modern, fitted cut
attribute_posture: walking with one leg forward and arms relaxed
